The Soul of Arabian Royalty

Al Noor Attar النور للعطور

Handcrafted pure oil Attars inspired by centuries of heritage, designed for the modern connoisseur.

Explore Collection Our Legacy
The Al Noor Legacy

Brewed in Tradition, Aged in Splendor

Al Noor Attar traces its lineage to the ancient alleys of Old Arabia, where master perfumers captured the essence of the sun, desert rains, and night-blooming jasmine in pure, concentrated nectar. Every drop is a symphony of rare botanicals and precious oils.

Our formula remains strictly solvent-free, containing zero alcohol. We blend rare Dehn Al Oud, Taif Rose, and Ambergris, aging them in oak barrels to release deep, evocative notes that linger for days.

The Pillars of Al Noor

Why noble houses select our house of fragrance

100% Pure Oils

Zero alcohol, zero chemical carriers. Rich, viscous attar that thrives on skin warmth.

60-Hour Longevity

Our molecular structure binds with the skin, projecting notes gracefully for over two days.

Ethical Sourcing

Sustainably harvested Taif Rose and organically cultivated wild Oud, supporting local farmers.

Our Signature Creations

Venture into the sensory treasures of the East

The Royal Best Sellers

Frequently Consulted Questions

Secrets of standard preservation and attar application

Apply a pulse drop using the glass wand on clean wrists. Warm the wrists together gently (do not rub harshly, as this breaks down the top notes) and tap onto the sides of the neck. You can also trace it along the collar of your clothes for a long-lasting aura.
Standard perfumes (EDP) blend fragrance oils with alcohol carriers. Attar is a hyper-concentrated, pure botanical and organic essential oil distillate. It contains no alcohol, feels warm and smooth, and matches your personal skin chemistry to create a completely bespoke silage.
We work directly with certified sustainable forestry projects in the Koh Kong region of Cambodia, ensuring every tree harvested is replanted and the oil undergoes traditional double-distillation over charcoal fire.

Own An Undying Legacy

Gift yourself or your beloved the crown jewel of Arabian artisanal perfumery.
